understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through KA59’s levels by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked ‘+’ is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, producing a WIN for the level and ultimately completing all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action shifted only the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked by a wall/boundary or other obstructing object; some adjacent objects could potentially be pushable if contacted in the movement direction. CLICK switched which selectable piece was under control by targeting its exact pixel coordinate from the state (same coordinate system as player.position/objects), after which subsequent MOVE actions affected that newly selected piece.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear fully enclosed by walls, so probe for any non-blocking wall behavior by attempting to move right.
history.reasoning: We appear fully enclosed by walls, so probe for any non-blocking wall behavior by attempting to move right.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving into the adjacent wall to see if it acts as a portal/slide despite the blocked hint.
history.reasoning: Try moving into the adjacent wall to see if it acts as a portal/slide despite the blocked hint.

history.summary: Turn 3: CLICK | We’re boxed in by walls on all sides; the only interaction available is the adjacent selectable to the right, so switch control to it to test for movement options.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all sides; the only interaction available is the adjacent selectable to the right, so switch control to it to test for movement options.

history.summary: Turn 4: MOVE_RIGHT | All directions show adjacent walls, but sometimes a shove into a wall reveals a passable edge; test right first since the goal area is to the right.
history.reasoning: All directions show adjacent walls, but sometimes a shove into a wall reveals a passable edge; test right first since the goal area is to the right.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_RIGHT | We’re boxed in by walls on all sides, so test whether the right wall allows any movement/clipping by attempting to move into it.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all sides, so test whether the right wall allows any movement/clipping by attempting to move into it.

history.summary: Turn 6: CLICK | We’re boxed in by walls on all sides; the only viable change is to switch back to the other selectable to reposition it toward the goal area.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all sides; the only viable change is to switch back to the other selectable to reposition it toward the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 7: MOVE_RIGHT | We’re boxed in on all four sides; test whether the adjacent 'wall' can be pushed or is passable by attempting to move into it to the right.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in on all four sides; test whether the adjacent 'wall' can be pushed or is passable by attempting to move into it to the right.

history.summary: Turn 8: MOVE_RIGHT | We’re boxed in by walls; try moving right to see if pushing/switching interaction with the adjacent selectable is possible.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls; try moving right to see if pushing/switching interaction with the adjacent selectable is possible.

history.summary: Turn 9: MOVE_LEFT | We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so try pushing/testing the only nearby boundary interaction by moving left against the wall.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so try pushing/testing the only nearby boundary interaction by moving left against the wall.

history.summary: Turn 10: CLICK | We’re enclosed by walls with no moves; switch to the other selectable which may have access to the goal area.
history.reasoning: We’re enclosed by walls with no moves; switch to the other selectable which may have access to the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 11: MOVE_UP | Try moving up onto the adjacent goal tile (even though flagged blocked) to align the selectable with the goal region.
history.reasoning: Try moving up onto the adjacent goal tile (even though flagged blocked) to align the selectable with the goal region.
